title: fix(enter): repair four pre-existing test failures
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Preserve query string in `/api/docs` -> `/docs` redirect (was dropping `?format=json` after #11130)
- Compute future period dynamically in `account-usage` bounds test (hardcoded `2026-05-01` is now in the past)
- Regenerate `effective-prices` snapshot for the gemini-search rate reset in #11226
- Remove obsolete `aliases` cost-collision test (data eliminated by #11226; `resolveModelName` tests still cover the invariant)

All 196 tests in the four affected files pass.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Sweeping up the test suite
gist.blurb: Cleaned up a few dusty corners in the test suite and fixed a minor redirect bug for the API docs. The CI pipeline is happy again.
gist.summary: Repaired four test failures in the enter gateway by fixing query string preservation in the /api/docs redirect, updating hardcoded dates, and regenerating snapshots.
gist.impact: The test suite is fully green again, and API users will correctly keep their query parameters when redirected to the docs.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a caretaker/janitor for the codebase, sweeping up broken code or red test failures. A retro monitor displaying green passing tests.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny paper hat, sweeping up broken red pixel fragments with a small broom. A retro computer monitor in the background glows with a bright green 'PASS' screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
